characters.name: Bonnie Short
characters.description: Bonnie ShortBiographical InformationPartnerMatt Short(ex-husband)Bonnie Shortis a recurring character in theCBSsitcomLife in Pieces. She is the ex-wife ofMatt Short, whom she went through a very messy divorce with.

characters.name: Chad
characters.description: ChadBiographical InformationGenderMalePartnerColleen Brandon-Ortega-Short (Ex-Fiance)RelativesPrincess (Dog)Series InformationSeasons1First Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"Ponzi Sex Paris Bounce"Portrayed byJordan PeeleChad is a reoccurring character of the CBS series Life in Pieces. He is the ex-fiance ofColleen Brandon-Ortega-Short.During season one, Chad still lives with Colleen as they got their house together and neither can afford to move. Chad has not accepted that their engagement is called off and is still in love with Colleen. They were together for three years before their split. Chad is first seen during thePilotepisode whenMatt ShortandColleen Brandon-Ortegago back to Chad and Colleen's house after a date. Chad and Colleen called off their engagement prior to the start of the series, however they continued to share a house together and due to Chad's problems with the IRS he cannot afford to leave and Colleen cannot afford to buy him out. Chad is seen upset as his ex-fiance has brought a date to their shared house and he tells Matt that in his mind the wedding is still on. He is seen crying from his room before Matt and Colleen decide to go somewhere else for the night. In this episode, Chad meets with Matt and Colleen to read off a list of demands before he goes to jail after accepting a plea bargain for his troubles with the IRS. All of his requests involved sleeping with Colleen, however she denied the requests and suggested a last meal with her grandmother. Chad is seen having a great relationship with Colleen's grandmother which makes Matt jealous. After dinner, as Colleen and Matt drive Chad home he decides to jump out of the car and run away in order to avoid going to prison for tax evasion. He leaves their dog Princess with Colleen and Matt.

characters.name: Colleen Brandon-Ortega
characters.description: Colleen Brandon-Ortega-ShortBiographical InformationGenderFemalePartnerMatt Short(husband)Chad(ex-fiancé)RelativesMia(mother)Sangria(step-mother)Tonita(grandmother)John Short(father-in-law)Joan Short(mother-in-law)Heather Hughes(sister-in-law)Greg Short(brother-in-law)Lucas Short(adopted son)Tyler Hughes(nephew)Samantha Hughes(niece)Sophia Hughes(niece)Unborn baby(nibling)Lark Short(niece)Talia Short(niece)Shirley "GiGi" Pirkle(grandmother-in-law) †Winston Pirkle(grandfather-in-law) †Jen Short(sister-in-law)Tim Hughes(brother-in-law)Clementine Hughes(niece-in-law)ResidenceLas Angeles CountySeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"Reverse Burden District Germany"Portrayed byAngelique CabralColleen Brandon-Ortega-Shortis a main character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourthseasons of theCBSsitcomLife in Pieces. She is the wife ofMatt Short, sister-in-law of Greg and Jen Short, and Heather Hughes; daughter-in law of Joan and John Short; Aunt of Tyler, Sam, Sophia Hughes & Lark and Talia Short. Colleen was the Human Resources manager at an air plane food company. It is there she met her future husband Matt Short.

characters.name: Greg Short
characters.description: Greg ShortBiographical InformationAliasesGreg(everybody)Honey(Joan&Jen)Bro, Brother(byMatt)GenderMaleBirth Date1980PartnerJen Short(wife)RelativesJohn Short(father)Joan Short(mother)Heather Hughes(older sister)Matt Short(older brother)Jen Short(wife)Lark Short(daughter)Talia Short(daughter)Tyler Hughes(nephew)Sam Hughes(niece)Sophia Hughes(niece)Unborn baby(nibling)Lucas Short(adopted nephew)Shirley "GiGi" Pirkle(grandmother) †Winston Pirkle(grandfather) †Colleen Short(sister-in-law)Tim Hughes(brother-in-law)Clementine Hughes(niece-in-law)ResidenceLos Angeles CountySeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"Reverse Burden District Germany"Portrayed byColin HanksGregory "Greg" Shortis the third and last child ofJohnandJoan Short, he has two older siblingsHeather HughesandMatt Short, he is the husband ofJennifer Shortand father ofLarkandTalia Short. Although it is never said, it is inferred that Greg is the favourite child. He is always getting teased by his older brother, Matt. His wife, Jen, gives birth to their first daughter, Lark, in the series premiere. She then gives birth to their second daughter, Talia, towards the end of season 4. Greg is a white man in his late-thirties, he has brown eyes and short dark brown hair. He is average height and build and often wears button down shirts and khaki pants. He has an eccentric personality that sometimes effects his appearance, occasionally adding in crazy accessories to make a point to his family.

characters.name: Jen Short
characters.description: Jen ShortBiographical InformationAliasesJen(everybody)Mommy(byLark)Sweetie, Baby(byGreg)GenderFemalePartnerGreg Short(husband)RelativesJohn Short(father-in-law)Joan Short(mother-in-law)Heather Hughes(sister-in-law)Matt Short(brother-in-law)Lark Short(daughter)Talia Short(daughter)Tyler Hughes(nephew)Samantha Hughes(niece)Sophia Hughes(niece)Unborn baby(nibling)Lucas Short(adopted nephew)Shirley "GiGi" Pirkle(grandmother-in-law) †Winston Pirkle(grandfather-in-law) †Colleen Short(sister-in-law)Tim Hughes(brother-in-law)Clementine Hughes(niece-in-law)ResidenceLos Angeles CountyOccupationLawyerSeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"Reverse Burden District Germany"Portrayed byZoe Lister-JonesJennifer "Jen" Collins-Shortis a lawyer who is the mother of Lark and the wife ofGreg Short. Jen gives birth to her and Greg's first daughter, Lark, in the series premiere. She announced that she is pregnant with their second child in the season 1 finale; however, it was later revealed that she had a miscarriage in the season 2 premiere. In the season 3 finale, her and Greg attempt to keep the secret that they are pregnant from the rest of the family, but it is eventually leaked. Towards the end of season 4, Jen gives birth to their second daughter, Talia. She announced that she is pregnant with their second child in season 1 finale; however, it was later revealed that she had a miscarriage in the season 2 premiere. She's a boss bitch with a sweet interior.
characters.personality_section: She's a boss bitch with a sweet interior.

characters.name: John Short
characters.description: John ShortBiographical InformationGenderMaleBirth Date1946PartnerJoan Short(wife)RelativesGreg Short(youngest son)Heather Hughes(daughter)Matt Short(oldest son)Lark Short(granddaughter)Talia Short(granddaughter)Tyler Hughes(grandson)Sam Hughes(granddaughter)Sophia Hughes(granddaughter)Unborn baby(grandchild)Lucas Short(adopted grandson)Shirley "GiGi" Pirkle(mother-in-law) †Winston Pirkle(father-in-law) †Jen Short(daughter-in-law)Colleen Short(daughter-in-law)Tim Hughes(son-in-law)Clementine Hughes(granddaughter-in-law)Series InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"Reverse Burden District Germany"Portrayed byJames BrolinJohn Bertram Shortis the husband ofJoan Short, and father ofHeather Hughes,Greg Short, andMatt Short. He has six grandchildren and is a retired airplane pilot. John is a tall white man in his sixties, he has neat white hair and brown eyes. He is always smiling, often talking animatedly about whatever interest he is currently fixated on. He wears button down shirts and jeans, always with a light brown jacket and shoes.

characters.name: Matt Short
characters.description: Matt ShortBiographical InformationAliasesMatt(everybody)Uncle Matt(by Tyler, Sam, Sophia & Lark)Babe, Baby(by Colleen)GenderMalePartnerColleen Short(wife)Bonnie Short(ex-wife)RelativesJohn Short(father)Joan Short(mother)Heather Hughes(older sister)Greg Short(younger brother)Lucas Short(adopted son)Tyler Hughes(nephew)Samantha Hughes(niece)Sophia Hughes(niece)Unborn baby(nibling)Lark Short(niece)Talia Short(niece)Shirley "GiGi" Pirkle(grandmother) †Winston Pirkle(grandfather) †Jen Short(sister-in-law)Tim Hughes(brother-in-law)Clementine Hughes(niece-in-law)Mia(mother-in-law)Sangria(step-mother-in-law)Tonita(grandmother-in-law)Series InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"Reverse Burden District Germany"Portrayed byThomas SadoskiMatthew "Matt" Jerome Shortis the second child and oldest son ofJoanandJohn Short. He has an older sister named Heather and a younger brother named Greg. He has been married twice, the first time to Bonnie who left him and took all of his money and remarried in Season 2 toColleen Brandon-Ortega-Short. He is the proud uncle of Tyler, Samantha, Sophia, and Lark and likes to give them advice that is not always helpful to their parents. Matt is a white man in his late-thirties, he has brown eyes and short dark brown hair. He has a very short beard, and is average height with a slim fit build. He often wears loose button down shirts and dark slim jeans. Matt is a very low-key person and usually looks slightly scruffy and casual.

characters.name: Sophia Hughes
characters.description:
Sophia HughesBiographical InformationGenderFemaleRelativesJohn Short(grandfather)Joan Short(grandmother)Tim Hughes(father)Heather Hughes(mother)Tyler Hughes(older brother)Sam Hughes(older sister)Unborn baby(youngest sibling)Matt Short(uncle)Greg Short(uncle)Jen Short(aunt)Colleen Short(aunt)Lark Short(cousin)Talia Short(cousin)Lucas Short(adopted cousin)Shirley "GiGi" Pirkle(great-grandmother) †Winston Pirkle(great-grandfather) †Clementine Hughes(sister-in-law)ResidenceLos Angeles CountySeries InformationSeasons1•2•3•4First Appearance"Pilot"Last Appearance"Reverse Burden District Germany"Portrayed byGiselle EisenbergSophia Hughesis the youngest daughter ofTimandHeather Hughesand also the younger sister ofTylerandSamantha Hughes. She is portrayed byGiselle Eisenberg. Sophia may be the youngest child, but she is the smartest. She has outsmarted her aunt Jen, who is a lawyer, and has won many arguments against her parents and siblings using well thought out strategies. She is a very good arguer. In the episode "Y2K Sophia Honeymoon Critter" in the Sophia story, she was born in the year 2008. It is unknown what date. When she was born she was colicky and crying a lot causing her siblings to fight a lot and all other chaos in the house.
She tends to feel left out for when her older siblings get to do things she can't for example when Samantha had her slumber party and watched a movie with her friends Sophia felt left out.
